title: The war your grandfather never had
caption:
Your grandfather had vices. You have something worse.

He had a bottle, a cigarette, something local and slow. You have a supercomputer in your pocket built by the smartest engineers alive to hold your attention as long as possible. The door to lust is one tap away. The envy feed never ends. Your prayer life quietly drowns in the scroll.

The difference between a detox and a war is strategy. A detox gives you a week. A war gives you a plan — specific structure, specific accountability, a man who knows your real screen-time numbers.

This is your generation's battle. Your grandfather never had to fight it. That doesn't make you weaker — it makes the requirement clearer. You need to fight.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #phonebattle #discipline #selfcontrol #masculinity #christianity #realtalk
